if ((@function_id == 333002 || @function_id == 250003 || @function_id == 323022)&& 
      (hs_strcmp(trim(@entrust_prop), "VTE") == 0 || hs_strcmp(trim(@entrust_prop), "H") == 0) &&
      ((hs_strcmp(@exchange_type, CNST_EXCHANGETYPE_SHA) == 0 || hs_strcmp(@exchange_type, CNST_EXCHANGETYPE_SHB) == 0)) && 
      hs_strstr(",799996,799997,799998,799999,799981,799982,799983,799984,799993,799988,799991,939988,", trim(@stock_code)) < 0)

if (hs_strcmp(@stock_type, CNST_STOCKTYPE_FUNDSUB) == 0
                && ( hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_BUYSALE) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_ADV_BESTPRICE) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_BESTFIVE_LMTPRICE) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_SELF_BESTPRICE) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_REALBUSI_LEFTCAN) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_BESTFIVE_LEFTCAN) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_ALLBUSICAN) == 0 )
                && (333002 == @function_id || 333999 == @function_id))

else if (hs_strcmp(@stock_type, CNST_STOCKTYPE_ETFSUB) == 0
                && (hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_BUYSALE) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_ADV_BESTPRICE) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_BESTFIVE_LMTPRICE) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_SELF_BESTPRICE) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_REALBUSI_LEFTCAN) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_BESTFIVE_LEFTCAN) == 0
                || hs_strcmp(@entrust_prop, CNST_ENTRUSTPROP_ALLBUSICAN) == 0 )
                && (@function_id == 333002 || 333999 == @function_id))
